name: Fervo Energy Co
business: Fervo Energy develops enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) to generate electricity. It sells electricity under long-term power purchase agreements (PPAs) to utilities and hyperscale data centers. The company is currently constructing the Cape Station project in Utah.

exposures.sentence: Our standardized modular approach contemplates deployment across GeoClusters via 50- megawatt GeoBlocks, and our estimate of capital expenditures to construct a single GeoBlock was approximately $7,000 kW as of December 31, 2025 , inclusive of wellfield, surface facilities and plant equipment.
Negotiating PPAs with offtakers, including investment-grade utilities and hyperscalers seeking clean, firm 24 7 power
Negotiating PPAs with offtakers, including investment-grade utilities and hyperscalers seeking clean, firm 24 7 power
We rely on power transmission facilities that we do not own or control.
Transformers and related grid equipment are critical for interconnecting our GeoBlocks.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin delivering first power from our 500-megawatt Cape Station project by late 2026

catalysts.event: 100 MW operating capacity at Cape Station
catalysts.sentence: and to reach approximately 100 megawatts of operating capacity by early 2027.

catalysts.event: Cape Station Phase I Unit 1 COD deadline
catalysts.sentence: If we do not commence operations under our PPA on Cape Station Phase I (Unit 1) by October 1, 2026

catalysts.event: Cape Station Phase I Units 2-3 COD deadline
catalysts.sentence: Cape Station Phase I (Units 2-3) by January 1, 2027

catalysts.event: Cape Station Phase II COD deadline
catalysts.sentence: and Cape Station Phase II by June 1, 2028

catalysts.event: GFA termination if no definitive offtake
catalysts.sentence: either party may terminate the GFA entirely if no definitive offtake agreement has been executed by March 19, 2028
